title: hydrophyllum magellanicum var. pinnatum
intro: Hydrophyllum magellanicum var. pinnatum, also known as the Mountain Twinflower or Pinnate Twinflower, is a plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hydrophyllum magellanicum var. pinnatum include its ability to help with wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall health.
